/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -g3 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-inline -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer "CMakeFiles/boundcraft_tests.dir/lower-bound-tests.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/boundcraft_tests.dir/upper-bound-tests.cpp.o" -o boundcraft_tests  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
